name: Apple Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the eggs into yolks and whites.
2. Add sour cream, finely chopped apple, flour, baking powder, and cinnamon to the egg yolks. Stir well until combined.
3. Beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
4. Gently fold the beaten egg white mixture into the yolk mixture.
5. Heat a griddle or large skillet over medium-high heat. Grease lightly with butter or oil.
6. Pour about 1/4 cup of batter onto the hot griddle for each pancake.
7. Cook until golden brown on both sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
8. Serve warm with a dollop of sour cream and maple syrup.
Makes about 12 pancakes.
